summary: The user is preparing for the release of Cyberpunk 2077 and is checking if their PC can handle the game, providing their specifications. They also discuss their gaming experiences, including playing Rocket League, Overwatch, and their interest in Apex Legends, while seeking tips to improve their skills in these games.
facts: The user has a PC with an Intel Core i7-9700K processor, NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3080 graphics card, 16 GB DDR4 3200 MHz RAM, and is running Windows 10. The user pre-ordered Cyberpunk 2077 last week and is excited about its release. The user has been playing Rocket League with friends almost every weekend for the past 2 months, trying to rank up to platinum. The user is a casual player in Rocket League, focusing on aerials and trying out new cars. The user has played Overwatch a lot lately, specifically mastering the new hero Baptiste's healing abilities. The user has played World of Warcraft in the past but has not kept up with it lately. The user usually plays casual or competitive 3v3 in Rocket League but has been trying to get into Hoops mode. The user is interested in checking out Apex Legends as a new multiplayer game.
